title: On the Farm Game Zone
source: Generated from approved unit runtime and linked master dictionary

games.title: Meaning Match
games.description: Match each unit word to its approved child-friendly meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A big farm animal that gives us milk.
rounds.explanation: cow: A big farm animal that gives us milk.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: The loud, short sound that a duck makes near the water.
rounds.explanation: quack: The loud, short sound that a duck makes near the water.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Something a hen lays that we can cook and eat.
rounds.explanation: egg: Something a hen lays that we can cook and eat.

games.title: Spelling Builder
games.description: Choose letter tiles to build important unit words.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: A female farm bird that lays eggs for us.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: The soft, gentle sound that a sheep makes in the field.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: Giving food to animals or people so they are not hungry.

games.title: Sentence Puzzle
games.description: Put unit words into the correct sentence order.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: The cow eats grass in the field.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: The pig rolls in the wet mud.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: The duck says quack near the pond.

games.title: Language Choice
games.description: Choose the form that makes the unit language accurate.

rounds.prompt: Which farm animal can swim on the pond?
rounds.explanation: A duck swims on water; hens, sheep and goats stay on the land.

rounds.prompt: Which sentence tells what the horse is doing right now?
choices: The horse has a long tail.
rounds.explanation: The -ing word running shows an action happening now; the others tell us a colour, a body part or a name.

rounds.prompt: Which sentence tells us what a sheep has?
rounds.explanation: Sheep are covered in wool; feathers and wings belong to birds and fins belong to fish.

games.title: Reading Detective
games.description: Use unit evidence to solve each reading clue.

rounds.prompt: Which animal did Amal and Ayeeyo go to see first?
choices: The ___ says ___. (for example: The cow says moo.)
rounds.explanation: Review the unit text evidence: The cow

rounds.prompt: What did Amal find in the straw after she fed the hen?
rounds.explanation: Review the unit text evidence: A little white egg

rounds.prompt: Why did the hen give Amal an egg?
choices: Because Amal was kind and fed her
rounds.answer: Because Amal was kind and fed her
rounds.explanation: Review the unit text evidence: Because Amal was kind and fed her

games.title: Speaking Quest
games.description: Listen, record, review and submit useful unit language.

rounds.prompt: Speaking 1 - Listen and point
rounds.target: Point to farm animals as an adult names them, then name them on your own.

rounds.prompt: Speaking 3 - Ask and answer
rounds.target: and answer about what the farm animals are doing.

rounds.prompt: Speaking 5 - Role-play
rounds.target: Act out the farmer's morning with a partner.

games.title: Word Order Race
games.description: Arrange unit language in a clear, accurate order.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: The cow sleeps inside the barn.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: The hen lays a brown egg.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: The wheat is growing in the field.

games.title: Definition Dash
games.description: Choose the approved meaning before moving to the next clue.

rounds.prompt: What does 'oink' mean in this unit?
choices: The short, snuffly sound that a pig makes in the mud.
A big farm animal that gives us milk.
A baby bird that has just come out of its shell.
rounds.answer: The short, snuffly sound that a pig makes in the mud.
rounds.explanation: oink: The short, snuffly sound that a pig makes in the mud.

rounds.prompt: What does 'picking' mean in this unit?
choices: A big farm animal that gives us milk.
A baby bird that has just come out of its shell.
Taking fruit or vegetables off a plant with your hands.
rounds.answer: Taking fruit or vegetables off a plant with your hands.
rounds.explanation: picking: Taking fruit or vegetables off a plant with your hands.

rounds.prompt: What does 'chick' mean in this unit?
choices: A pink farm animal with a curly tail and flat nose.
A baby bird that has just come out of its shell.
A big farm animal that gives us milk.
rounds.answer: A baby bird that has just come out of its shell.
rounds.explanation: chick: A baby bird that has just come out of its shell.

games.title: Word Type Power
games.description: Identify how each vocabulary word works in English.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'tractor'?
rounds.explanation: tractor is used as a noun in this dictionary sense.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'potatoes'?
rounds.explanation: potatoes is used as a noun in this dictionary sense.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'goat'?
rounds.explanation: goat is used as a noun in this dictionary sense.

games.title: Memory Pairs
games.description: Reveal tiles and connect each word with its meaning.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 1.
pairs: A baby bird that has just come out of its shell.
A pink farm animal with a curly tail and flat nose.
The deep, long sound that a cow makes in the field.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 2.
pairs: The loud, high sound that a horse makes in its stall.
A big farm building where animals and hay stay.
A tall farm plant we use to make bread.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 3.
pairs: Putting seeds into the soil so plants can grow.
Getting bigger, like a plant or a child.
Long orange vegetables that grow under the soil.

games.title: Question Quest
games.description: Read each unit question carefully and choose the best answer.

rounds.prompt: What sound does a cow make?
rounds.explanation: A cow says moo; quack is a duck, baa is a sheep and neigh is a horse.

rounds.prompt: Which animal says baa?
rounds.explanation: A sheep says baa; a duck quacks, a cow moos and a hen clucks.

rounds.prompt: What do we call a baby hen?
rounds.explanation: A baby hen is a chick; a calf is a baby cow, a lamb is a baby sheep and a foal is a baby horse.

games.title: Unit Mission
games.description: Finish with a mixed challenge across the whole unit.

rounds.prompt: Which word names a farm animal?
rounds.explanation: A goat is an animal; a tractor, a barn and grass are all found on a farm but they are not alive animals.

rounds.prompt: Which farm animal gives us milk?
rounds.explanation: A cow gives milk; a hen and a duck give eggs and we do not milk a horse.

rounds.prompt: Which farm animal lays the eggs we eat for breakfast?
rounds.explanation: A hen lays eggs; a sheep, a cow and a horse do not lay eggs at all.
